features.evidence: 1 and another thunderbolt 4 port now i would have loved to see another usba a port on this or even another type c port but this should definitely have an sd card slot this is coming with a dedicated gpu it has a beautiful oled display photographers are going to be using this video creators will potentially be using this and they re going to want sd card slots now with my hp spectre 14 i got two different dongles but this one no dongles came in the box which probably means it doesn t come with the retail units and hp probably just sent those out with a review unit so i apologize for that but it does come with a pen this came with the hp pen it works absolutely fantastic it feels just as smooth to right on the display it did with its smaller 14 in model and because that panel is 120 htz you just get really low latency i should also say that the magnet on the right side of the laptop is super strong i can bounce it off the table and the magnet just catches it that s pretty come on that s pretty impressive now if i shake it hard enough it s obviously going to fall but if i do this it s not going to go anywhere now one person in my youtube short unboxing ask me how the laptop feels on your lap i ve already tested it out and look it s comfortable it s a good size it spans across my entire lap i can go handsfree i don t feel it s going to fall off my lap it s very good i will say it s a bit topheavy just because this display is a heavier display than most other laptops so just keep that in mind you don t want to have it too close to the front of your knees or obviously it s going to fall off but if you re just sitting here and working all day it feels very good to use now because this is a convertible or twoin one the display can flip 360 so you can use it as a tablet if you want to this hinge is nice and stiff there s not a ton of wobble if i hold it this it s just not going to fall straight back which means it s nice and tight but i absolutely love this keyboard it s exactly the spectre 14 now some of you might complain that there s no numpad personally i don t want one i don t need one i don t want to see it on a laptop but i get why you do a lot of you crunch numbers it s super important i just think overall it makes the laptop cleaner without one these keys super clicky it has a nice sound they just feel so good to type on and then you get this massive massive touchpad which is haptic which is the same idea and concept that macbook airs using and it feels really good to use after using this you re not going to want to go back to a plastic or a glass touchpad this should be the gold standard on all laptops going forward now you have top firing and bottom firing speakers the sound quality on this laptop is pretty good i m going to compare it to the macbook pro 16 and you guys let me know which one sounds better i should also mention about sticker placement they re pretty straight this time sticker man did his job but i don t see an imax enhanced sticker the color gamut is pretty much identical to the 14 in model and same with the color ac accy the only thing that s a little bit different is i did find the screen brightness to be a tiny bit lower on this one not by much but it is a tiny bit lower even though technically this is an hdr display with a peak brightness of 500 nits now one of you also asked me about pwm flicker now pwm flicker on this laptop is really good even below 50 it didn t start having that flicker so these new generation samsung panels are obviously much better but i did notice some latency i noticed some latency or screen tearing rather when i was doing the screen tearing test and even when i was playing games so there s definitely some software update that needs to happen i should also mention that there s a fingerprint scanner embedded into the power button or you can use the cameras for facial recognition if you want to use your face instead so fun fact this is a 4k camera but it only shows up as a 1440p camera under the windows camera app if you go to hp s app where you can adjust things the frame blur the background etc you can record a 4k video using the front facing camera now more importantly i think it looks pretty good but also let me know how the microphones sound now this does have a bigger power brick 140 w adapter which is bigger than the 14in model just because this does come with a dedicated gpu but it s using a type c connector and this is a great thing type c means if you lose this power brick you don t have to find a proprietary power brick to replace it you can just go on on amazon find a 140 w gan charger and use it with this laptop now this retail unit comes with a intel core ultra 755h you have 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory beautiful 16in oled display 2

1 and another thunderbolt 4 port now i would have loved to see another usba a port on this or even another type c port but this should definitely have an sd card slot this is coming with a dedicated different dongles but this one no dongles came in the box which probably means it doesn t come with the retail units and hp probably just sent those out with a review unit so i apologize for that but it does come with a pen this came with the hp pen it works absolutely fantastic it feels just as smooth to right on the display it did with its smaller 14 in model and because that panel is 120 htz that s pretty impressive now if i shake it hard enough it s obviously going to fall but if i do this it s not going to go anywhere now one person in my youtube short unboxing ask me how the laptop will say it s a bit topheavy just because this display is a heavier display than most other laptops so just keep that in mind you don t want to have it too close to the front of your knees or obviously it s going to fall off but if you re just sitting here and working all day it feels very good to use now because this is a convertible or twoin one the display can flip 360 so you can use it as a tablet if you want to this hinge is nice and stiff there s not a ton of wobble if i hold it this it s just not going to fall straight back which means it s nice and tight but i absolutely love this keyboard it s exactly the spectre 14 now some of you might complain that there s no numpad personally i don t want one i don t need one i don t want to see it on a laptop but i get why you do a lot of you crunch numbers it s super important i just think overall it makes the laptop cleaner without one these keys super clicky it has a nice sound they just feel so good to type on and then you get this massive massive touchpad which is haptic which is the same idea and concept that macbook airs using and it feels really good to use after using this you re not going to want to go back to a plastic or a glass touchpad this should be the gold standard on all laptops going forward now you have top firing and bottom firing speakers the sound quality on this laptop is pretty good i m going to compare it to the macbook pro 16 and you guys let me know which one sounds better i should also mention about sticker placement they re pretty straight this time sticker man did his job but i don t see an imax enhanced sticker the color gamut is pretty much identical to the 14 in model and same with the color ac accy the only thing that s a little bit different is i did find the screen brightness to be a tiny bit lower on this one not by much but it is a tiny bit lower even though technically this is an hdr display with a peak brightness of 500 nits now one of you also asked me about pwm flicker now pwm flicker on this laptop is really good even below 50 it didn t start having that flicker so these new generation samsung panels are obviously much better but i did notice some latency i noticed some latency or screen tearing rather when i was doing the screen tearing test and even when i was playing games so there s definitely some software update that needs to happen i should also mention that there s a fingerprint scanner embedded into the power button or you can use the cameras for facial recognition if you want to use your face instead so fun fact this is a 4k camera but it only shows up as a 1440p camera under the windows camera app if you go to hp s app where you can adjust things the frame blur the background etc you can record a 4k video using the front facing camera now more importantly i think it looks pretty good but also let me know how the microphones sound now this does have a bigger power brick 140 w adapter which is bigger than the 14in model just because this does come with a dedicated gpu but it s using a type c connector and this is a great thing type c means if you lose this power brick you don t have to find a proprietary power brick to replace it you can just go on on amazon find a 140 w gan charger and use it with this laptop now this retail unit comes with a intel core ultra 755h you have 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory beautiful 16in oled display 2

2 the port lineup is identical so on the left hand side you get a usba a port this one does not have a flap because the laptop itself is a bit thicker and then of course because this is using that gem cut design design you have your combo audio jack on the back left corner and then on the back right corner you have a thunderbolt four port hdmi 2

so last week i reviewed the hp spectre x360 14in and this week i m reviewing its bigger brother the 16in version now even though both laptops look identical the main takeaway with the bigger version is you get a bigger display and the option to spec it with a dedicated gpu now they re identical same aluminum lid same nightfall black color as you can see here there s a ton of fingerprints on the lid already and i ve just started touching it and look it s a beautiful color because depending on how the light reflects off of the top lid i sometimes think it looks navy blue it s a little squishy on the top over here but it is a magnesium alloy chassis this is obviously a bit heavier than the 14 in model at 4

8k resolution 1 tbte mvme ssd now performance is where things get super weird because this is not performing as it should now single core clock speeds are identical to the competition which is great but multi core speeds were a lot higher to laptops that are in 14in chassis including the spectre 14 mozzilla firefox which is a test that should complete in the 20s with most cpus that are similar to this this one completed it in 55 minutes that s way too long now all of these tests were done with the performance profile on under the my hp app and it just didn t make a difference i could not push this thing to its full potential i even checked the cpu power compared to the 14 in model this one was topping out at about 28 to 29 watts the 14in model was hitting 36 now it s not a drastic difference but it s still a difference considering that this is a bigger chassis even things the average core clock speeds were higher on the 14in model but then i checked the cpu temps and the cpu temps on the 14 in version were in the high 80s this one was in the mid 60s so that automatically tells me that there s a lot of thermal headroom here that s not being utilized now the advantage to all of this is that the fan noise was always pretty low on this laptop even when this thing was under full load it would be 44 to 45 db which is you can hear the fans but it s not overbearing a typical gaming laptop now what all of this tells me is that the hardware is fine it s just that whatever software or bios hp is running on the 16in model needs an update to push this laptop even harder now the rtx 450 is running as it should so that s a good thing and if you want a game on this you totally can i did again notice some screen tearing or frame drops in the games i was playing but the frame rates were always averaged correctly for this type of gpu i don t recommend gaming on this laptop at 2880 by 1800 the 4050 is not powerful enough for that unless you re playing a super old title but this lap top should be played at 1920 x 1200 and you ll get really good frame rates at that resolution now to get inside there s only four screws you have to remove but not much is upgradeable ram is soldered onto the motherboard as is with all core ultra processors this year but you do have one drive slot which is under here that you can upgrade to something bigger if you want more storage space you do have a swappable wi fi 7 card you do have a two fan solution they re pretty big fans i would have loved them to to be on separate sides with copper in the middle but they re stacked and you have two massive copper heat pipes running across the top now battery life on this wasn t nearly as good as the 14 in model this is an 83w hour battery and only got 5 hours and 33 minutes before needing to charge so here s the thing the hp spectre 16 has all the things that make the hp spectre 14 very special plus with a dedicated gpu the only thing i can say right now is i don t the battery life and you re not getting the full performance that this laptop should be offering now i m not saying don t buy it all i m going to say is don t buy it yet i want to see if it s specific to just my unit or if there s a specific software update that hp is going to push to unlock its full potential now if they do i m not going to make an entire new video about it but i will make a short about it and i ll place a link to it in the description down below that wraps up my review of the hp spectre x360 16 in if you have any questions let me know the video if you liked it subscribe if you haven t already and i ll see you guys in the next one

there are videos that i love to make and then there are videos that i procrastinate crazy you see the way we review laptops is we use them for their intended use case so when we get a bad one in it is just an annoying experience having to use it and that s the case with this laptop the hp spectre 16 for 2024 look i value your time so rather than walk you through each aspect of a laptop that we just don t recommend instead i m going to tell you straight up what the situation is then at the end i ll tell you which laptops you should probably buy instead and for all those folks who do want more details you ll find them on our website let s get into it the spectre 16 is hb s premium 16 in laptop it has a lot of benefits that you would expect from such a device a stunning fast refresh rate ola display a comfortable keyboard and a premium build but the spectre 16 is uncompetitive with its peers from other manufacturers you see its graphical performance is subpar this laptop is marketed at creators but can only be had with up to an rtx 4050 which is nvidia s lowest end dedicated graphics the yoga pronai which is lenovo s competitor can be had with a more powerful rtx 4060 in fact in some markets even a 4070 and this performance delta extends to general cpu tasks too the spectre 16 maxes out at a core ultra 7 which hp restricts to drawing a continuous 45 wats of power this significantly underperforms the same processor in dell s xer 16 and it is way behind the yoga pro 9i with its core ultra 9 and in case you re wondering we do have hp s latest bars installed it was meant to have fixed this laptop cpu performance problems prior to this bias it performed much worse anyway what really surprised us is even with its poor performance the spectre 16 feels really warm to the touch more so than its competitors for example when doing graphical tasks the spectre s keyboard deck feels significantly hotter than lovos yogo pri and in light use this laptop feels extremely warm honestly when riding the script for this video i was simply uncomfortable using it and warning if you re left handed it s going to be even worse for you people tend to leave their non dominant hand resting on the keyboard deck this laptop feels significantly hotter on the right side than on the left but the issues don t end there when this laptop is doing pretty much nothing at all the fans sometimes turn on it is noticeable and it is annoying the only part where this laptop really excels is when running performance tasks while on battery after running cine ben on a loop for 30 minutes it had the most battery remaining out of the windows competitors but even then that wind is just quickly eroded when you look at the laptop s performance while on battery it s close to 50 of the yoga pro 9i and when we look at a more realistic battery test watching a netflix movie over wi fi the spectre fell behind samsung s galaxy book 4 pro and that laptop has a smaller battery now given this laptop s lower end components you d expect it to be priced accordingly but it isn t at the the time of this review the spectre 16 had an msrp of 22,200 the yoga pr and i that i ve been comparing it with is 1,900 300 less and as i ve shown you that laptop is much more powerful than this one and it feels cooler to the touch with less fan noise plus it doesn t weigh that much more look folks there are a bunch of other annoyances for example this laptop s lid is very hard to open because the magnet holding it to the keyboard deck is insanely strong it s 1440 webcam which should be good looks really saturated ated but i promised you i d be brief so let s wrap if you re looking for a premium 16 in laptop there are better options available than the hb spectre 16 if you want one with powerful graphics say your creator or even a coder who likes to game on the side you should either buy a macbook pro 16 or the yoga pro 9i i think i ve covered the reasons for this plenty in this video already so if instead you just want a nice large screen laptop and don t need powerful graphics the macbook a15 or the the samsung galaxy book 4 pro are the ones to get both those laptops feel better built and are much thinner and lighter which just makes them a joy to carry around the macbook a15 has no fan noise at all and has longer battery life but you do lose out on that fast refresh rate display and its keyboard isn t as comfortable the galaxy book 4 pro performs similar to the spectre in cpu tasks but in light tasks it feels significantly cooler and has less fan noise if you re considering the samsung its most frustrating downside is its dreadful palm rejection of his crazy large trackpad but guess what the spectre 16 suffers from the exact same issue and if you re wondering i did recently review the smaller 14in and i didn t love it the 16 in model is a more compelling offering for example it doesn t feel as warm while using it if you d me to do a video specifically on the 16 in galaxy book 4 pro let me know with a comment below as i said our full review notes on this laptop are on our website as well as the laptops that i d recommend you buy instead youtuber shtick time make sure to the video and get subscribed not only does it help this channel grow which means that we can make more videos for you but it makes my dearest mother very proud till next time go do something awesome with your day and i will catch you later

so last week i reviewed the hp spectre x360 14in and this week i m reviewing its bigger brother the 16in version now even though both laptops look identical the main takeaway with the bigger version is you get a bigger display and the option to spec it with a dedicated gpu now they re identical same aluminum lid same nightfall black color as you can see here there s a ton of fingerprints on the lid already and i ve just started touching it and look it s a beautiful color because depending on how the light reflects off of the top lid i sometimes think it looks navy blue it s a little squishy on the top over here but it is a magnesium alloy chassis this is obviously a bit heavier than the 14 in model at 4

2 the port lineup is identical so on the left hand side you get a usba a port this one does not have a flap because the laptop itself is a bit thicker and then of course because this is using that gem cut design design you have your combo audio jack on the back left corner and then on the back right corner you have a thunderbolt four port hdmi 2

1 and another thunderbolt 4 port now i would have loved to see another usba a port on this or even another type c port but this should definitely have an sd card slot this is coming with a dedicated gpu it has a beautiful oled display photographers are going to be using this video creators will potentially be using this and they re going to want sd card slots now with my hp spectre 14 i got two different dongles but this one no dongles came in the box which probably means it doesn t come with the retail units and hp probably just sent those out with a review unit so i apologize for that but it does come with a pen this came with the hp pen it works absolutely fantastic it feels just as smooth to right on the display it did with its smaller 14 in model and because that panel is 120 htz you just get really low latency i should also say that the magnet on the right side of the laptop is super strong i can bounce it off the table and the magnet just catches it that s pretty come on that s pretty impressive now if i shake it hard enough it s obviously going to fall but if i do this it s not going to go anywhere now one person in my youtube short unboxing ask me how the laptop feels on your lap i ve already tested it out and look it s comfortable it s a good size it spans across my entire lap i can go handsfree i don t feel it s going to fall off my lap it s very good i will say it s a bit topheavy just because this display is a heavier display than most other laptops so just keep that in mind you don t want to have it too close to the front of your knees or obviously it s going to fall off but if you re just sitting here and working all day it feels very good to use now because this is a convertible or twoin one the display can flip 360 so you can use it as a tablet if you want to this hinge is nice and stiff there s not a ton of wobble if i hold it this it s just not going to fall straight back which means it s nice and tight but i absolutely love this keyboard it s exactly the spectre 14 now some of you might complain that there s no numpad personally i don t want one i don t need one i don t want to see it on a laptop but i get why you do a lot of you crunch numbers it s super important i just think overall it makes the laptop cleaner without one these keys super clicky it has a nice sound they just feel so good to type on and then you get this massive massive touchpad which is haptic which is the same idea and concept that macbook airs using and it feels really good to use after using this you re not going to want to go back to a plastic or a glass touchpad this should be the gold standard on all laptops going forward now you have top firing and bottom firing speakers the sound quality on this laptop is pretty good i m going to compare it to the macbook pro 16 and you guys let me know which one sounds better i should also mention about sticker placement they re pretty straight this time sticker man did his job but i don t see an imax enhanced sticker the color gamut is pretty much identical to the 14 in model and same with the color ac accy the only thing that s a little bit different is i did find the screen brightness to be a tiny bit lower on this one not by much but it is a tiny bit lower even though technically this is an hdr display with a peak brightness of 500 nits now one of you also asked me about pwm flicker now pwm flicker on this laptop is really good even below 50 it didn t start having that flicker so these new generation samsung panels are obviously much better but i did notice some latency i noticed some latency or screen tearing rather when i was doing the screen tearing test and even when i was playing games so there s definitely some software update that needs to happen i should also mention that there s a fingerprint scanner embedded into the power button or you can use the cameras for facial recognition if you want to use your face instead so fun fact this is a 4k camera but it only shows up as a 1440p camera under the windows camera app if you go to hp s app where you can adjust things the frame blur the background etc you can record a 4k video using the front facing camera now more importantly i think it looks pretty good but also let me know how the microphones sound now this does have a bigger power brick 140 w adapter which is bigger than the 14in model just because this does come with a dedicated gpu but it s using a type c connector and this is a great thing type c means if you lose this power brick you don t have to find a proprietary power brick to replace it you can just go on on amazon find a 140 w gan charger and use it with this laptop now this retail unit comes with a intel core ultra 755h you have 16 gb of lp ddr5x memory beautiful 16in oled display 2

8k resolution 1 tbte mvme ssd now performance is where things get super weird because this is not performing as it should now single core clock speeds are identical to the competition which is great but multi core speeds were a lot higher to laptops that are in 14in chassis including the spectre 14 mozzilla firefox which is a test that should complete in the 20s with most cpus that are similar to this this one completed it in 55 minutes that s way too long now all of these tests were done with the performance profile on under the my hp app and it just didn t make a difference i could not push this thing to its full potential i even checked the cpu power compared to the 14 in model this one was topping out at about 28 to 29 watts the 14in model was hitting 36 now it s not a drastic difference but it s still a difference considering that this is a bigger chassis even things the average core clock speeds were higher on the 14in model but then i checked the cpu temps and the cpu temps on the 14 in version were in the high 80s this one was in the mid 60s so that automatically tells me that there s a lot of thermal headroom here that s not being utilized now the advantage to all of this is that the fan noise was always pretty low on this laptop even when this thing was under full load it would be 44 to 45 db which is you can hear the fans but it s not overbearing a typical gaming laptop now what all of this tells me is that the hardware is fine it s just that whatever software or bios hp is running on the 16in model needs an update to push this laptop even harder now the rtx 450 is running as it should so that s a good thing and if you want a game on this you totally can i did again notice some screen tearing or frame drops in the games i was playing but the frame rates were always averaged correctly for this type of gpu i don t recommend gaming on this laptop at 2880 by 1800 the 4050 is not powerful enough for that unless you re playing a super old title but this lap top should be played at 1920 x 1200 and you ll get really good frame rates at that resolution now to get inside there s only four screws you have to remove but not much is upgradeable ram is soldered onto the motherboard as is with all core ultra processors this year but you do have one drive slot which is under here that you can upgrade to something bigger if you want more storage space you do have a swappable wi fi 7 card you do have a two fan solution they re pretty big fans i would have loved them to to be on separate sides with copper in the middle but they re stacked and you have two massive copper heat pipes running across the top now battery life on this wasn t nearly as good as the 14 in model this is an 83w hour battery and only got 5 hours and 33 minutes before needing to charge so here s the thing the hp spectre 16 has all the things that make the hp spectre 14 very special plus with a dedicated gpu the only thing i can say right now is i don t the battery life and you re not getting the full performance that this laptop should be offering now i m not saying don t buy it all i m going to say is don t buy it yet i want to see if it s specific to just my unit or if there s a specific software update that hp is going to push to unlock its full potential now if they do i m not going to make an entire new video about it but i will make a short about it and i ll place a link to it in the description down below that wraps up my review of the hp spectre x360 16 in if you have any questions let me know the video if you liked it subscribe if you haven t already and i ll see you guys in the next one
